item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi, I am a final year computer science student studying at Boston University. I am from Bangalore, India. My interests are in operating systems, embedded and real-time oses. I also like to tinker with hardware and build stuff. Education Some of my relevant coursework include: CS210: Introduction to Computer Systems CS320: Introduction to Programming Languages CS330: Introduction to Algorithms CS350: Computer System Fundamentals CS410: Advanced Software Systems CS525: Introduction to Compiler Design EC535: Introduction to Embedded Systems EC527: Multi-core GPU Programming CS350: Introduction to Operating Systems (Also known as CS552) In addition to the courses I have taken at Boston University, I am also a certified from XRTerra as an AR/VR developer through their AR x VR Developer Program .
